name: Booty Run
short_description: Enter the world of an adventurer who is exploring the Aztec Jungles. You come across something you should not and awaken the beast. Now you are on the run for your life as you run through the Ancient Ruins. Made by women and those with disabilities. Anything we receive we will improve thegame
detailed_description:
Should turn on Epic Graphic setting for best graphics quality. 

Enter the world of an adventurer who is exploring the Aztec Jungles. You come across something you should not and awaken the beast. Now you are on the run for your life as you run through the Ancient Ruins.

1. The protagonist is a 3rd person female character

2. You can run, move right, left, slide or jump to move around obstacles

3. This is a infinite runner game

Made by women and those with disabilities. Anything we receive we will use completely to reinvest back into making games like this or improving features.
